crons.comment: Pre-market price refresh — 09:00 EAT (06:00 UTC), weekdays, before USE opens
End-of-day snapshot — 14:00 EAT (11:00 UTC), weekdays, 30 min after USE closes at 13:30 EAT
Dividend scrape — 10:00 EAT (07:00 UTC), weekdays; scrapes USE & AfricanFinancials
News scrape every 4 hours — matches NEWS_CACHE_TTL_HOURS; 8 Ugandan/EA outlets
Weekly full refresh — Saturday 09:00 EAT (06:00 UTC); prices + dividends + news + IR health check
